hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Today brings a burst of energy, making it a great day for tackling challenges.
aries.love: An unexpected romantic gesture may brighten your relationship.
aries.career: Your leadership skills will shine, helping you gain respect from coworkers.

taurus.general: Patience rewards you today; don't rush through tasks.
taurus.love: A heartfelt conversation will strengthen your bond with a partner.
taurus.career: Financial matters require your attention; consider seeking advice.

gemini.general: Communication is key; express your thoughts openly.
gemini.love: A surprise encounter could spark new connections.
gemini.career: Collaborative efforts will lead to success in your projects.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity comes to you today; trust your instincts.
cancer.love: Nurturing your loved ones will lead to greater intimacy.
cancer.career: Your creativity provides fresh solutions in the workplace.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today; use it to inspire those around you.
leo.love: A romantic outing will rekindle the passion in your relationship.
leo.career: Seize opportunities to showcase your talents and skills.

virgo.general: Focus on the details and success will follow.
virgo.love: Honesty will strengthen your relationship with a partner.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will aid in problem-solving today.

libra.general: Seek balance in both work and personal life.
libra.love: A heart-to-heart discussion will clear any misunderstandings.
libra.career: Networking could lead to exciting opportunities.

scorpio.general: Your intuition is heightened; trust your gut feelings.
scorpio.love: An old flame may resurface, bringing unresolved feelings.
scorpio.career: Ambition drives you today; pursue your goals with vigor.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is calling; embrace new experiences.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will spice up your romantic life.
sagittarius.career: Creative thinking will aid in breakthroughs at work.

capricorn.general: Hard work pays off; remain focused on your goals.
capricorn.love: A stable relationship may lead to new commitments.
capricorn.career: Financial investments will yield positive results.

aquarius.general: Innovation is your strength; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Friendship may blossom into something deeper.
aquarius.career: Be prepared to adapt to sudden changes in the workplace.

pisces.general: Embrace your creative side; inspiration is everywhere.
pisces.love: A romantic surprise may be in store for you today.
pisces.career: Focus on teamwork to achieve the best results.

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: It’s not whether you get knocked down, it’s whether you get up.
professional.author: Vince Lombardi

professional.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
professional.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe in the magic within you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

captions.text: Chase your dreams and never look back.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: There’s a way to do it better – find it.
tech.author: Thomas Edison

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.
tech.author: John Lasseter

tech.text: We’re changing the world with technology.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Life is short, smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and it froze!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
fun.author: Dalai Lama

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Working hard for something we don’t care about is called stress. Working hard for something we love is called passion.
faith.author: Simon Sinek

faith.text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Nothing can dim the light which shines from within.
faith.author: Maya Angelou

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is hope.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Sometimes the smallest things take up the most room in your heart.
faith.author: Winnie the Pooh

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wise men speak because they have something to say; fools because they have to say something.
wisdom.author: Plato

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: St. Augustine

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, seek also humility.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: A fool thinks himself to be wise, but a wise man knows himself to be a fool.
wisdom.author: William Shakespeare
